hops.context: The implementation of the cloud layer has been left for future work
The implementation of the cloud layer has been left for future work

question: In the experimental setup described in the performance evaluation section of the paper, why is the cloud layer not included as a component?

options.A: The operating system used was Windows 11 Home, which inherently includes cloud layer components by default.
options.B: Cloud layer components were omitted because they were found to negatively impact the performance of the operating system.
options.C: The implementation of the cloud layer was planned but deferred to future work due to its complexity and resource requirements.
options.D: The experimental setup was designed to test only the base functionalities of the operating system, excluding any cloud integrations.

explanation: The correct answer is A because the context explicitly states that the implementation of the cloud layer has been left for future work. This indicates a decision to defer this part of the setup, rather than an inherent inclusion (B), a performance issue (C), or a focus solely on base functionalities (D).
context: Windows 11 Home | The implementation of the cloud layer has been left for future work | The implementation of the cloud layer has been left for future work
